name: postgres_database_agent
description: PostgreSQL database troubleshooting agent for diagnosing connectivity, performance, configuration, and replication issues.
use_cases: Performance issues (slow queries, high CPU, memory)

name: k8s_agent
description: Kubernetes troubleshooting agent for diagnosing pod, service, endpoint, and infrastructure issues.

name: sysadmin_agent
description: Host-level sysadmin agent for diagnosing and remediating infrastructure issues: Docker/Podman container crashes, systemd service failures, disk exhaustion, OOM kills, and reading PostgreSQL log files directly from containers.
use_cases: Restarting a Docker or Podman container
Checking container status and exit codes
Disk and memory utilization on VMs
Reading PostgreSQL log files when the database is down

name: incident_agent
description: Incident diagnostic bundle agent that collects fresh data from database, Kubernetes, OS, and storage layers and packages it into a .tar.gz bundle for vendor support.
use_cases: Collecting system snapshots for vendor support
Gathering multi-layer diagnostics (database, k8s, OS, storage)

name: research_agent
description: Web research agent for finding current information about software versions, release notes, CVEs, best practices, and documentation.
